name: pair-paced-amrap-gorillot
description: Pair-paced AMRAP (In pairs: P1 200m run while P2 AMRAPs, swap) — real 2026-07-16 GORILLOT doc shape: ONE merged metcon exercise, partnerWorkout false, relay-flagged pacer. Poster must render solo (no ledger, no OUR, no team share) with the swap pacer as a SWAP-chip row (5× 200m Run) whose logged 1000m total is NOT round-multiplied (8 rounds × 200m = 1.6km was the repair bug), and the swap structure note as the sub-line. rounds (8) deliberately differs from trips (5).

workout.title: GORILLOT - FIT FOR LIFE
workout.rawText:
STRENGTH (squat)
Front Squat
4 sets x 3 reps @70➔85+% (Climbing)

METCON (Medium)
In pairs, 12 minutes AMRAP:
P1 - 200m run
P2 - AMRAP:
6 Thrusters @35/50kg
6 Burpees
* Continue from where you stopped
** Score is the total rounds completed

Cash out
2 sets:
15-20 Tibialis Raises
25-30 sec/side Single Arm Plank Hold

exercises.name: Pairs AMRAP 12
exercises.prescription: In pairs — P1 runs 200m while P2 AMRAPs; swap each run, continue where you stopped
exercises.rawText:
In pairs, 12 minutes AMRAP:
P1 - 200m run
P2 - AMRAP:
6 Thrusters @35/50kg
6 Burpees
* Continue from where you stopped
** Score is the total rounds completed

exercises.name: Cash Out
exercises.prescription: 2 sets: 15-20 Tibialis Raises, 25-30 sec/side Single Arm Plank Hold
